text: - 2.15.1 DAILY CLEANUP of the construction area will be strictly enforced. Subcontractor shall perform cleanup and trash removal (on a daily basis) of all debris generated by Subcontractor to a central site container or truck as directed by Contractor. Contractor will provide dumpsters unless stated otherwise in Subcontractor's Scope of Work. If after 24 hours' notice to Subcontractor's office by Contractor, Subcontractor has not diligently proceeded with the cleanup as described herein, then the Contractor has the right to proceed with the cleanup at the Subcontractor's cost and expense.
